## Scope

Is this something Rosa should do OUT OF THE BOX (feature-flag off by
default, add code + wizard step + docs), or is it enough to expose a
hook so a user can extend Rosa themselves?

Rosa's principle: keep the core small and readable. New integrations
need a clear reason to live in-tree.
